title: Cosmos SDK cosmos.slashing.v1beta1 Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for the cosmos.slashing.v1beta1 module of the Cosmos SDK gRPC-gateway REST API.

cosmos.slashing.v1beta1.Params.description: Params represents the parameters used for by the slashing module.

params.description: Params represents the parameters used for by the slashing module.

cosmos.slashing.v1beta1.QueryParamsRespo.title: QueryParamsResponse is the response type for the Query/Params RPC method

valSigningInfo.title: val_signing_info is the signing info of requested val cons address

startHeight.title: Height at which validator was first a candidate OR was un-jailed

indexOffset.description:
Index which is incremented every time a validator is bonded in a block and
_may_ have signed a pre-commit or not. This in conjunction with the
signed_blocks_window param determines the index in the missed block bitmap.

jailedUntil.description: Timestamp until which the validator is jailed due to liveness downtime.

tombstoned.description:
Whether or not a validator has been tombstoned (killed out of validator
set). It is set once the validator commits an equivocation or for any other
configured misbehavior.

missedBlocksCounter.description:
A counter of missed (unsigned) blocks. It is used to avoid unnecessary
reads in the missed block bitmap.

valSigningInfo.description:
ValidatorSigningInfo defines a validator's signing info for monitoring their
liveness activity.

cosmos.slashing.v1beta1.QuerySigningInfo.title:
QuerySigningInfoResponse is the response type for the Query/SigningInfo RPC
method

startHeight.title: Height at which validator was first a candidate OR was un-jailed

indexOffset.description:

_may_ have signed a pre-commit or not. This in conjunction with the

set). It is set once the validator commits an equivocation or for any other

missedBlocksCounter.description:
A counter of missed (unsigned) blocks. It is used to avoid unnecessary

items.description:
ValidatorSigningInfo defines a validator's signing info for monitoring their
liveness activity.

info.title: info is the signing info of all validators

nextKey.description:
next_key is the key to be passed to PageRequest.key to
query the next page most efficiently. It will be empty if
there are no more results.

total.title:
total is total number of results available if PageRequest.count_total
was set, its value is undefined otherwise
